jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Dunzo
jsonLd.description:
Dunzo invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Meerut location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Dunzo:
Dunzo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dunzo!
jsonLd.skills: MongoDB, Node.js, Python, Rust, Git, Docker, Agile/Scrum, TypeScript
